_meta.notes: Initial stub seeded from KR25 ABANDONED close-report §6 Item 1 (2026-06-05). All three BOK ECOS daily series verified trade-date / decision-date stamped — no shift required. Empirical pagination ceiling = 10,000 rows per request; daily 40+ year series require 5-year chunked fetch per `kr_fx_exposure_beta_cross_section_xs/src/data_load.py` `fetch_bok_ecos_usd_krw()`.

bok.ecos_731Y001.usd_krw.notes: 원/미국달러(매매기준율) daily close; trade-date stamped. BOK ECOS stat_code 731Y001 / sub_code 0000001. Verified by KR25 LT-1 β_FX rolling regression (10,265 daily obs 1988-2025). KR25 SPEC originally cited deprecated stat-code `036Y001_USD_PM`; live working code = `731Y001/0000001`. availability_lag_days = 0.

bok.ecos_722Y001.base_rate.notes: 한국은행 기준금리 daily; decision-date publication. BOK ECOS stat_code 722Y001. MPC decision-date publication = same-day knowable. Verified by KR25 Step 6 event calendar (158 event-months 2000-2025: 125 hold + 18 hike + 15 cut MPC decisions classified per month). availability_lag_days = 0.

bok.ecos_817Y002.ktb_3y_yield.notes: KTB 3-year yield daily; trade-date stamped. BOK ECOS stat_code 817Y002. availability_lag_days = 0. (KR25 referenced this code in SPEC §A.1 for control-variable construction; usage path not exercised because Step 7 binding gate failed before yield-controls integration.)
